description: Corrected, executable pre-registration for SwitchSync Markets P1 v2. Fixes audit defects D1-D13 (docs/audits/p1_v1_independent_audit.md). NO real market data anywhere. NOT YET EXECUTED.

tolerances.tie_band_note: differences within gamma_significance_std_mult * pooled_std across seeds are declared TIES (neither PASS nor FAIL for that comparison).

statistical_tests.paired_contrast: per-seed paired difference; report mean, std, and a paired sign/Wilcoxon test across the seed block; significance requires |mean| > 3*pooled_std AND paired test p<0.05.
statistical_tests.multiple_comparison_note: gate comparisons are pre-registered and few; no post-hoc selection permitted.

G0A_exact_reproduction.goal: Reproduce the paper's regime (sigma_12=0.1) at paper-scale N.
G0A_exact_reproduction.rule: If compute budget forbids N>=200 at T=4000, declare INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST. G0A must NEVER be silently replaced by G0B.
G0A_exact_reproduction.cost_flag: EXPENSIVE: N=400, T=4000, dt=0.01 => 400k steps on 1600-dim state x grid x seeds.

G0B_calibrated_demonstration.goal: Calibrated small-N demonstration of the fast-vs-slow mechanism.
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.label: CALIBRATED_QUALITATIVE_DEMONSTRATION (sigma_12=1.5 chosen for tractable N, NOT the paper's 0.1)
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.forbidden_claim: must NOT assert an N-dependence of the switching threshold unless the switching grid is run across multiple N (a separate, unbudgeted sub-experiment).

G0C_msf_minimal.goal: Minimal-system transverse Lyapunov with CORRECT anti-phase channels.
G0C_msf_minimal.note: The minimal FHN layer at N=2 is a limit cycle (lambda_max~0, v1-verified); a T_swt-dependent boundary may still not appear. Record honestly; do not overclaim.

G1_weak.goal: Switching beats a static-sparse graph of equal instantaneous density.
G1_weak.comparator: static_sparse (same N_IL, same seed base snapshots)
G1_weak.metric: transverse contraction rate gamma (surrogate) and tail E12 (FHN)
G1_weak.accept: gamma_fast - gamma_static > 3*pooled_std AND paired test p<0.05

G1_strict.goal: Switching beats BOTH the average graph AND the best admissible static network under the same edge budget.

comparators.average_graph: static with per-pair weight = occupancy (identical for all paired arms)
comparators.best_admissible_static: argmax over static sparse sets of size N_IL (search: all base snapshots + a bounded random search of K_search=200 sets per seed) of the transverse contraction rate

G1_strict.accept: gamma_best_switching_rate - max(gamma_average, gamma_best_static) > 3*pooled_std AND paired test p<0.05
G1_strict.prior: Fast-switching averaging theory implies the FAST arm will NOT beat the average graph. A temporal advantage, if any, is expected at INTERMEDIATE rates (Zhang-Strogatz 2021) and is the subject of a separate branch.

G2_order.goal: Temporal order changes contraction beyond rate/density/average, using PAIRED schedules.
G2_order.construction: src/networks/paired_switching.py: same base snapshots, exact horizon H=240, identical average operator; shuffled_order permutes epoch order; shuffled_dwell operates on a genuinely non-constant frozen dwell distribution (variable_dwell_schedule).
G2_order.accept: |gamma_ordered - gamma_shuffled_order| > 3*pooled_std at the intermediate rate AND paired test p<0.05

G3_robustness.goal: Robustness of the G1-weak advantage to IMPLEMENTED stresses only.
G3_robustness.signed_operator: src/simulation/surrogate_v2.py:build_basis_operator_v2 (GENUINE negative weights, budget preserved, >=1 strictly negative asserted)
G3_robustness.accept: advantage (gamma_fast - gamma_static) > 0 with paired test p<0.05 per stage; record the first stage where it vanishes.

G4_identifiability.goal: Recover the true switching from observations using ONLY past data, with SAME-realization ground truth.
G4_identifiability.accept: precision AND recall > 0.6 (synchronous) AND contraction_corr_same_realization > 0.5; basis estimator must beat the factor-confounded one.
G4_identifiability.async_language: report as 'asynchrony/LOCF (Epps-like) degradation', NOT a causal demonstration of the Epps effect.

removed_from_v1.H3_coverage_vs_reachability_isolation: REMOVED as a gate. A single-variable separation of coverage and reachability is not achievable for the mirror-pair matching structure without changing >1 variable. temporal_reachability_ratio is retained and REPORTED as a descriptor alongside node_sweep, with no isolation claim.

reporting_requirements.atomicity: atomic write, refuse-overwrite, no silent H//dwell+1, log any dropped/capped coverage.
